auth.signupSubtitle: Create your Crimson Society account and step into a private circle built for riders, status, and legacy.
auth.checkEmailBody: We sent you a confirmation link. Open your inbox, verify your email, then return to log in.
auth.passwordInvalid: Password does not meet all requirements below.
auth.accountCreated: Account created. Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.enterEmailToResend: Enter your email to resend confirmation.
auth.ageConfirm: I confirm I am 18 years or older.
auth.complianceRequired: Please confirm you are 18 or older and agree to the Terms and Community Guidelines before creating your account.
auth.referralCodeHint: Enter a member's code if someone invited you.
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Your email has not been confirmed yet.
auth.enterEmailFirst: Enter your email first so we know where to resend it.
auth.confirmationSent: Confirmation email sent. Check your inbox and spam folder.
auth.resendConfirmation: Didn’t get it? Resend confirmation email.
auth.deletionRequested: Your account deletion request was submitted and is pending admin approval.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.noMessagesDescription: Start a conversation from a rider profile or the Riders page.
inbox.sosArchivedReadOnly: SOS archived — message history is read-only.
inbox.notificationsEmptyDescription: Follows, meets, and messages will appear here.
inbox.notificationsDescription: Follows, meet joins, removals, cancellations, ride endings, and meet chat in one ledger.
inbox.notificationsMenuHint: Use the ⋯ menu to mark all as read or open notification settings.

shop.title: Shop
shop.merchTagline: Limited pieces · Crimson Society issue · Hand-finished drop
shop.rewardsTagline: Redeem credits for stickers, gear, discounts & more
shop.emptyDescription: Exclusive pieces. Limited runs. Stay tuned.
shop.comingSoonToastBody: This piece has not been released yet

credits.historySubtitle: Your balance, monthly progress, and full earn history.
credits.redemptionHistorySubtitle: Your past credit reward redemptions. Redeem new rewards in the Shop.
credits.inviteSubtitle: Share your referral link. Earn Crimson Credits when riders join and upgrade to Blackcard.
credits.howItWorksSubtitle: Earn credits from meets and referrals, then redeem in Shop → Credit Rewards.
credits.defaultRulesWarning: Showing default earn rules. Live economy settings could not be loaded.
credits.earnRulesNote: Admins may adjust credit values during beta. Past ledger history always remains unchanged.
credits.milestoneDescription: One-time achievement rewards. Each milestone awards once and appears in Credits History only.
credits.myQrCodeSubtitle: Share a print-ready QR that opens your referral signup link.
credits.qrPrintHint: High-contrast QR for stickers, thank-you cards, merch inserts, and event flyers.
credits.qrMissingCode: You do not have a referral code yet. Create one on Edit Profile.
credits.appQrDescription: Share Crimson Society with riders and friends.
credits.appQrImageAlt: Crimson Society app signup QR code
credits.appQrShareText: Join Crimson Society — sign up here:
credits.appQrPrintHint: Print-ready app QR for stickers, thank-you cards, merch inserts, flyers, and events.

blackcard.title: Blackcard
blackcard.activeDescription: You are inside the premium layer of Crimson Society. Member-only rides, early collections, and elevated identity are unlocked across the app.
blackcard.memberOnlyMeetsDescription: Filter Blackcard meets on the meets page and host private runs for members.
blackcard.earlyCollectionAccessDescription: First-window access to select drops, private releases, and premium pieces.
blackcard.elevatedPresenceDescription: Your Blackcard badge is visible on your profile and member cards.
blackcard.heroDescription: Blackcard unlocks premium identity, private access, early drops, and Crimson Credits benefits for riders building the Society from the inside.
blackcard.creditsTagline: Blackcard members earn and redeem Crimson Credits for future rewards, premium drops, and member-only privileges.
blackcard.memberCreditsNote: Earn credits as a member. Redeem future rewards when redemption launches.
blackcard.noActivePlans: No active Blackcard plans are available right now.
blackcard.billingMissingUrl: Billing portal URL was not returned.
blackcard.billingError: Something went wrong opening billing management.
blackcard.previewUnlockedDescription: Your membership unlocks Crimson Credits redemption (coming soon), early merch access, and exclusive meets.
blackcard.previewLockedDescription: Subscribe to unlock Crimson Credits redemption for future rewards, early merch access, and exclusive meets.
blackcard.paywallDescription: Entry grants earlier access, preferred placement, private privileges, and a quieter tier of access held beyond the public line.
blackcard.dashboardDescription: Premium membership built around riding, community, and participation. Earn Crimson Credits through meets and referrals, redeem future member rewards, and get early merch access.

sos.title: Rider SOS
sos.intro: Activate SOS in an emergency and keep your emergency profile information up to date.
sos.locationDescription: Turn this ON so nearby riders can be alerted with your GPS location during an SOS
sos.activateDescription: Send an emergency alert with your saved profile details and location to help nearby riders respond faster.
sos.medicalNotesPlaceholder: Conditions, medications, or notes for responders
sos.bikeInfoDescription: Auto-filled from your profile and garage. Update your garage in Edit Profile to change this.
sos.noBikeInfo: No bike info on your profile yet.
sos.locationOffWarning: Location Sharing is OFF. Admins can still see your SOS, but nearby riders may not be accurately alerted without GPS.
sos.nearbyWarning: Admins can still see your SOS, but nearby riders may not be accurately alerted without GPS.
sos.activeDescription: Your SOS is active. Nearby Crimson Society riders can see this alert and volunteer help.
sos.missingProfileWarning: Your emergency contact is incomplete. You can still activate SOS, but admins may have limited contact information.

settings.profileSaveError: Could not save profile. Please try again.
settings.saveLoginRequired: You need to be logged in to save.
settings.uploadTimedOut: Upload timed out. Please try again.

admin.noStripeSubscriptions: No active Stripe subscriptions were found.
admin.contentRemoved: User content removed and auth account deleted. Moderation audit retained.
admin.loginRequired: You need to be logged in.
admin.profileMissing: Your profile row was not found.
admin.accessDenied: You do not have access to this page.
admin.ownAccountProtection: You cannot suspend, block, or limit your own admin account.

profileMenu.languageError: Could not save language. Try again.
profileMenu.accountDeletionDescription: You will be signed out immediately. Your account enters deletion_pending until an admin approves. You can sign back in only to check status or cancel while pending.
